channel.title: Arm Limited — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Arm Limited (arm).

item.title: CVE-2026-0995 · 3.6 LOW
item.description: An issue has been identified in Arm C1-Pro before r1p2-50eac0, where, under certain conditions, a TLBI+DSB might fail to ensure the completion of memory accesses related to SME.

item.title: CVE-2025-0647 · 7.9 HIGH
item.description: In certain Arm CPUs, a CPP RCTX instruction executed on one Processing Element (PE) may inhibit TLB invalidation when a TLBI is issued to the PE, either by the same PE or another PE in the shareability domain. In this case, the PE may retain stale TL…

item.title: CVE-2025-6349 · 5.1 MEDIUM — Mali GPU Kernel Driver allows improper GPU memory processing operations
item.description: Use After Free vulnerability in Arm Ltd Valhall GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Arm 5th Gen GPU Architecture Kernel Driver allows a local non-privileged user process to perform improper GPU memory processing operations to gain access to already freed memo…

item.title: CVE-2025-8045 · 4 MEDIUM — Mali GPU Kernel Driver allows improper GPU processing operations
item.description: Use After Free vulnerability in Arm Ltd Valhall GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Arm 5th Gen GPU Architecture Kernel Driver allows a local non-privileged user process to perform improper GPU processing operations to gain access to already freed memory.This…

item.title: CVE-2025-2879 · 5.1 MEDIUM — Mali GPU Kernel Driver allows improper GPU processing operations
item.description: Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor vulnerability in Arm Ltd Valhall GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Arm 5th Gen GPU Architecture Kernel Driver allows a local non-privileged user process to perform improper GPU processing operations…

item.title: CVE-2025-3212 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Mali GPU Kernel Driver allows access to already freed memory
item.description: Use After Free vulnerability in Arm Ltd Bifrost GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Valhall GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Arm 5th Gen GPU Architecture Kernel Driver allows a local non-privileged user process to perform valid GPU memory processing operations to g…

item.title: CVE-2025-0932 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Mali GPU Userspace Driver allows access to already freed memory
item.description: Use After Free vulnerability in Arm Ltd Bifrost GPU Userspace Driver, Arm Ltd Valhall GPU Userspace Driver, Arm Ltd Arm 5th Gen GPU Architecture Userspace Driver allows a non-privileged user process to perform valid GPU processing operations, includi…

item.title: CVE-2025-7427 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Uncontrolled Search Path Element in Arm Development Studio before 2025
item.description: Uncontrolled Search Path Element in Arm Development Studio before 2025 may allow an attacker to perform a DLL hijacking attack. Successful exploitation could lead to local arbitrary code execution in the context of the user running Arm Development St…

item.title: CVE-2025-1246 · 7.8 HIGH — Mali GPU Userspace Driver allows an Out-of-Bounds access
item.description: Improper Restriction of Operations within the Bounds of a Memory Buffer vulnerability in Arm Ltd Bifrost GPU Userspace Driver, Arm Ltd Valhall GPU Userspace Driver, Arm Ltd Arm 5th Gen GPU Architecture Userspace Driver allows a non-privileged user pr…

item.title: CVE-2025-0819 · 7.8 HIGH — Mali GPU Kernel Driver allows access to already freed memory
item.description: Use After Free vulnerability in Arm Ltd Bifrost GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Valhall GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Arm 5th Gen GPU Architecture Kernel Driver allows a local non-privileged user process to perform valid GPU memory processing operations to g…

item.title: CVE-2025-0073 · 7.8 HIGH — Mali GPU Kernel Driver allows improper GPU memory processing operations
item.description: Use After Free vulnerability in Arm Ltd Valhall GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Arm 5th Gen GPU Architecture Kernel Driver allows a local non-privileged user process to perform improper GPU memory processing operations to gain access to already freed memo…

item.title: CVE-2025-0427 · 7.8 HIGH — Mali GPU Kernel Driver allows access to already freed memory
item.description: Use After Free vulnerability in Arm Ltd Bifrost GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Valhall GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Arm 5th Gen GPU Architecture Kernel Driver allows a local non-privileged user process to perform valid GPU processing operations to gain acc…

item.title: CVE-2025-0072 · 7.8 HIGH — Mali GPU Kernel Driver allows improper GPU memory processing operations
item.description: Use After Free vulnerability in Arm Ltd Valhall GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Arm 5th Gen GPU Architecture Kernel Driver allows a local non-privileged user process to perform improper GPU memory processing operations to gain access to already freed memo…

item.title: CVE-2025-0050 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Mali GPU Userspace Driver allows an Out-of-Bounds access
item.description: Improper Restriction of Operations within the Bounds of a Memory Buffer vulnerability in Arm Ltd Bifrost GPU Userspace Driver, Arm Ltd Valhall GPU Userspace Driver, Arm Ltd Arm 5th Gen GPU Architecture Userspace Driver allows a non-privileged user pr…

item.title: CVE-2025-0015 · 7.8 HIGH — Mali GPU Kernel Driver allows improper GPU processing operations
item.description: Use After Free vulnerability in Arm Ltd Valhall GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Arm 5th Gen GPU Architecture Kernel Driver allows a local non-privileged user process to make improper GPU processing operations to gain access to already freed memory.This is…

item.title: CVE-2024-6790 · 4 MEDIUM — Mali GPU Kernel Driver can cause the whole system to become unresponsive
item.description: Loop with Unreachable Exit Condition ('Infinite Loop') vulnerability in Arm Ltd Bifrost GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Valhall GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Arm 5th Gen GPU Architecture Kernel Driver allows a non-privileged user process to make valid GPU me…

item.title: CVE-2024-7881 · 5.1 MEDIUM
item.description: An unprivileged context can trigger a data memory-dependent prefetch engine to fetch the contents of a privileged location and consume those contents as an address that is also dereferenced.

item.title: CVE-2024-10929 · 5.1 MEDIUM — Spectre-BSE
item.description: In certain circumstances, an issue in Arm Cortex-A57, Cortex-A72 (revisions before r1p0), Cortex-A73 and Cortex-A75 may allow an adversary to gain a weak form of control over the victim's branch history.

item.title: CVE-2024-11864 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — SCP-Firmware Vulnerability
item.description: Specifically crafted SCMI messages sent to an SCP running SCP-Firmware release versions up to and including 2.15.0 may lead to a Usage Fault and crash the SCP

item.title: CVE-2024-11863 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — SCP-Firmware Vulnerability
item.description: Specifically crafted SCMI messages sent to an SCP running SCP-Firmware release versions up to and including 2.15.0 may lead to a Usage Fault and crash the SCP

item.title: CVE-2024-5660 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Use of Hardware Page Aggregation (HPA) and Stage-1 and/or Stage-2 translation on Cortex-A77, Cortex-A78, Cortex-A78C, Cortex-A78AE, Cortex-A710, Cortex-X1, Cortex-X1C, Cortex-X2, Cortex-X3, Cortex-X4, Cortex-X925, Neoverse V1, Neoverse V2, Neoverse V…

item.title: CVE-2024-9413 · 8 HIGH
item.description: The transport_message_handler function in SCP-Firmware release versions 2.11.0-2.15.0 does not properly handle errors, potentially allowing an Application Processor (AP) to cause a buffer overflow in System Control Processor (SCP) firmware.

item.title: CVE-2024-7883 · 3.7 LOW 🌩️ — CMSE secure state may leak from stack to floating-point registers
item.description: When using Arm Cortex-M Security Extensions (CMSE), Secure stack contents can be leaked to Non-secure state via floating-point registers when a Secure to Non-secure function call is made that returns a floating-point value and when this is the first…

item.title: CVE-2024-3655 · 7.8 HIGH — Mali GPU Kernel Driver allows improper GPU memory processing operations
item.description: Use After Free vulnerability in Arm Ltd Bifrost GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Valhall GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Arm 5th Gen GPU Architecture Kernel Driver allows a local non-privileged user to make improper GPU memory processing operations to gain acce…

item.title: CVE-2024-4607 · 7.8 HIGH — Mali GPU Kernel Driver allows improper GPU memory processing operations
item.description: Use After Free vulnerability in Arm Ltd Bifrost GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Valhall GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Arm 5th Gen GPU Architecture Kernel Driver allows a local non-privileged user to make improper GPU memory processing operations to gain acce…

item.title: CVE-2024-2937 · 7.8 HIGH — Mali GPU Kernel Driver allows improper GPU memory processing operations
item.description: Use After Free vulnerability in Arm Ltd Bifrost GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Valhall GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Arm 5th Gen GPU Architecture Kernel Driver allows a local non-privileged user to make improper GPU memory processing operations to gain acce…

item.title: CVE-2024-0153 · 7.8 HIGH — Mali GPU Firmware allows improper GPU processing operations
item.description: Improper Restriction of Operations within the Bounds of a Memory Buffer vulnerability in Arm Ltd Valhall GPU Firmware, Arm Ltd Arm 5th Gen GPU Architecture Firmware allows a local non-privileged user to make improper GPU processing operations to acce…

item.title: CVE-2024-4610 · 7.4 HIGH 💥 — Mali GPU Kernel Driver allows improper GPU memory processing operations
item.description: Use After Free vulnerability in Arm Ltd Bifrost GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Valhall GPU Kernel Driver allows a local non-privileged user to make improper GPU memory processing operations to gain access to already freed memory.This issue affects Bifros…

item.title: CVE-2023-6363 · 5.1 MEDIUM — Mali GPU Kernel Driver allows improper GPU processing operations
item.description: Use After Free vulnerability in Arm Ltd Valhall GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Arm 5th Gen GPU Architecture Kernel Driver allows a local non-privileged user to make improper GPU memory processing operations. If the system’s memory is carefully prepared b…

item.title: CVE-2024-1067 · 7.4 HIGH — Mali GPU Kernel Driver allows improper GPU memory processing operations
item.description: Use After Free vulnerability in Arm Ltd Bifrost GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Valhall GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Arm 5th Gen GPU Architecture Kernel Driver allows a local non-privileged user to make improper GPU memory processing operations. On Armv8.0…

item.title: CVE-2024-1395 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Mali GPU Kernel Driver allows improper GPU memory processing operations
item.description: Use After Free vulnerability in Arm Ltd Arm 5th Gen GPU Architecture Kernel Driver allows a local non-privileged user to make improper GPU memory processing operations. If the system’s memory is carefully prepared by the user, then this in turn could…

item.title: CVE-2024-0151 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Insufficient argument checking in Secure state Entry functions in software using Cortex-M Security Extensions (CMSE), that has been compiled using toolchains that implement 'Arm v8-M Security Extensions Requirements on Development Tools' prior to ver…

item.title: CVE-2024-1065 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Mali GPU Kernel Driver allows improper GPU memory processing operations
item.description: Use After Free vulnerability in Arm Ltd Bifrost GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Valhall GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Arm 5th Gen GPU Architecture Kernel Driver allows a local non-privileged user to make improper GPU memory processing operations to gain acce…

item.title: CVE-2024-0671 · 6.8 MEDIUM — Mali GPU Kernel Driver allows improper GPU memory processing operations
item.description: Use After Free vulnerability in Arm Ltd Midgard GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Bifrost GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Valhall GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Arm 5th Gen GPU Architecture Kernel Driver allows a local non-privileged user to make improper GPU memory…

item.title: CVE-2023-6241 · 7.8 HIGH — Mali GPU Kernel Driver allows improper GPU memory processing operations
item.description: Use After Free vulnerability in Arm Ltd Midgard GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Bifrost GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Valhall GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Arm 5th Gen GPU Architecture Kernel Driver allows a local non-privileged user to exploit a software race…

item.title: CVE-2023-6143 · 8.4 HIGH — Mali GPU Kernel Driver allows improper GPU memory processing operations
item.description: Use After Free vulnerability in Arm Ltd Midgard GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Bifrost GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Valhall GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Arm 5th Gen GPU Architecture Kernel Driver allows a local non-privileged user to exploit a software race…

item.title: CVE-2023-5249 · 7 HIGH — Mali GPU Kernel Driver allows improper GPU memory processing operations
item.description: Use After Free vulnerability in Arm Ltd Bifrost GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Valhall GPU Kernel Driver allows a local non-privileged user to make improper memory processing operations to exploit a software race condition. If the system’s memory is care…

item.title: CVE-2023-5643 · 7.8 HIGH — Mali GPU Kernel Driver allows improper GPU memory processing operations
item.description: Out-of-bounds Write vulnerability in Arm Ltd Bifrost GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Valhall GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Arm 5th Gen GPU Architecture Kernel Driver allows a local non-privileged user to make improper GPU memory processing operations. Depend…

item.title: CVE-2023-5091 · 7 HIGH — Mali GPU Kernel Driver allows improper GPU processing operations
item.description: Use After Free vulnerability in Arm Ltd Valhall GPU Kernel Driver allows a local non-privileged user to make improper GPU processing operations to gain access to already freed memory. This issue affects Valhall GPU Kernel Driver: from r37p0 through r…

item.title: CVE-2023-32804 — Mali GPU Userspace Driver can make an Out-of-Bounds access
item.description: Out-of-bounds Write vulnerability in Arm Ltd Midgard GPU Userspace Driver, Arm Ltd Bifrost GPU Userspace Driver, Arm Ltd Valhall GPU Userspace Driver, Arm Ltd Arm 5th Gen GPU Architecture Userspace Driver allows a local non-privileged user to write a…

item.title: CVE-2023-5427 · 7.8 HIGH — Mali GPU Kernel Driver allows improper GPU processing operations
item.description: Use After Free vulnerability in Arm Ltd Bifrost GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Valhall GPU Kernel Driver, Arm Ltd Arm 5th Gen GPU Architecture Kernel Driver allows a local non-privileged user to make improper GPU processing operations to gain access to a…

item.title: CVE-2023-4295 · 7.8 HIGH — Mali GPU Kernel Driver allows improper GPU memory processing operations
item.description: A local non-privileged user can make improper GPU memory processing operations to gain access to already freed memory.

item.title: CVE-2023-3889 · 7.8 HIGH — Mali GPU Kernel Driver exposes sensitive data from freed memory
item.description: A local non-privileged user can make improper GPU memory processing operations. If the operations are carefully prepared, then they could be used to gain access to already freed memory.

item.title: CVE-2023-4272 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Mali GPU Kernel Driver exposes sensitive data from freed memory
item.description: A local non-privileged user can make GPU processing operations that expose sensitive data from previously freed memory.

item.title: CVE-2023-34970 · 4.7 MEDIUM — Mali GPU Kernel Driver Allows Improper GPU Memory Processing Operations
item.description: A local non-privileged user can make improper GPU processing operations to access a limited amount outside of buffer bounds or to exploit a software race condition. If the system’s memory is carefully prepared by the user, then this in turn could giv…

item.title: CVE-2023-33200 · 4.7 MEDIUM — Mali GPU Kernel Driver Allows Improper GPU Memory Processing Operations
item.description: A local non-privileged user can make improper GPU processing operations to exploit a software race condition. If the system’s memory is carefully prepared by the user, then this in turn could give them access to already freed memory.

item.title: CVE-2023-4211 · 5.5 MEDIUM 💥 — Mali GPU Kernel Driver Allows Improper GPU Memory Processing Operations
item.description: A local non-privileged user can make improper GPU memory processing operations to gain access to already freed memory.

item.title: CVE-2023-4039 · 4.8 MEDIUM 🌩️ 🤔 — GCC's-fstack-protector fails to guard dynamically-sized local variables on AArch64
item.description: **DISPUTED**A failure in the -fstack-protector feature in GCC-based toolchains that target AArch64 allows an attacker to exploit an existing buffer overflow in dynamically-sized local variables in your application without this being detected. This st…

item.title: CVE-2022-43703 — Incomplete verification of installation file signature
item.description: An installer that loads or executes files using an unconstrained search path may be vulnerable to substitute files under control of an attacker being loaded or executed instead of the intended files.

item.title: CVE-2022-43702 — Incomplete verification of installation file signature
item.description: When the directory containing the installer does not have sufficiently restrictive file permissions, an attacker can modify (or replace) the installer to execute malicious code.
